description_long: This is a compact, cylindrical kettle with a smooth, matte metallic body and a wide, flat base for stability. It features a prominent, top-mounted arched handle made of a material resembling light wood or bamboo, attached at two points on opposite sides of the lid. The kettle has a short, stout spout on one side for pouring, and a flat removable lid with a geometric, loop-shaped knob at the center for easy lifting. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, with no visible decorative patterns or embellishments. The surface appears clean and modern, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, cylindrical kettle with a matte metallic body, arched wooden handle, flat removable lid, and short spout. The design is minimalistic and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the spout on the left, the flat lid with a loop-shaped knob, and the full arched handle.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle attachment visible and no spout or knob in sight, emphasizing the kettle's cylindrical shape.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with the spout on the right, showing the lid and handle clearly.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the handle attachment and the back of the spout, with the lid's knob partially visible.
